title: ligustrum henryi
intro: Ligustrum henryi, also known as Chinese Privet, is a deciduous shrub native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ligustrum henryi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
